item.title: I am obsessed!
item.description: I'm a huge fan of my cars, can you blame me?

item.title: I know what I have
item.description: I know that I'm so lucky with it. Are you this lucky?

media:content.media:title: I know what I have
media:content.media:description: I know that I'm so lucky with it. Are you this lucky?

item.title: Bad Neighbors Worst Nightmare
item.description: A massive ship horn built for full-size vessels ends up in a pickup truck and it’s just as wild as it sounds. After tracking down a rare, industrial-grade horn and waiting weeks for missing parts to arrive, the full setup finally comes together. Designed to run on high-pressure air and produce a deep, ground-shaking tone, this thing makes typical train horns sound small.

media:content.media:title: Bad Neighbors Worst Nightmare
media:content.media:description: A massive ship horn built for full-size vessels ends up in a pickup truck and it’s just as wild as it sounds. After tracking down a rare, industrial-grade horn and waiting weeks for missing parts to arrive, the full setup finally comes together. Designed to run on high-pressure air and produce a deep, ground-shaking tone, this thing makes typical train horns sound small.

item.description: The people who don't like corvettes don't get it

item.title: Neighbors call security on my “illegal” military truck
item.description: I moved my square body for a quick favor, left it parked for 40 minutes, and somehow a neighbor still called security over “no tag.”

media:content.media:title: Neighbors call security on my “illegal” military truck
media:content.media:description: I moved my square body for a quick favor, left it parked for 40 minutes, and somehow a neighbor still called security over “no tag.”
